rulings.Case Title: MELVIN DESIN VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Continue The Deposition Of Melvin Desin
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 7, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Hollingsworth & Vose Co. and Lorillard Tobacco Co.¿s motion for protective order to continue the deposition of Melvin Desin is off calendar at the moving parties¿ request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant The Scotts Company, Llc. To Respond To Asbestos General Order No. 129 Plaintiffs' Standard Interrogatories To Defendants, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 7, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant The Scotts Co., LLC to respond to asbestos General Order No. 129 plaintiffs¿ standard interrogatories to defendants and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder In Motion To Compel Responses Of Defendant The Scotts Company, Llc. To General Order No. 129 Standard Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 7, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Brayton Purcell¿s joinder in motion to compel defendant The Scotts Co., LLC to respond to asbestos General Order No. 129 plaintiffs¿ standard interrogatories to defendants and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
